_comment: Charities the HumanityOS maintainer personally endorses, shown in the 'Charities I support' section of the donate page. These are INDEPENDENT nonprofits, unaffiliated with HumanityOS; a gift goes to that organization directly (not to HumanityOS or its maintainer). Add an entry to feature a charity (infinite-of-X). Read by both the web donate page and native donate.rs. Fields: name, mission, url (their donate page), note (deductibility / relationship disclosure), abbrev, color.

charities.name: Sponsor-A-Can
charities.mission: A registered 501(c)(3) fighting poverty through sanitation, recycling, and community clean-up for homeless and disadvantaged communities.
charities.note: Independent 501(c)(3). The HumanityOS maintainer volunteers as its Vice-President. Tax-deductibility depends on your situation.
